blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Check if the system automatically offers a slot to the next customer when a cancellation occurs.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an automatic offer when a slot opens, but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While there is evidence of customers entering the waitlist and booking offers, there is no evidence of the system automatically offering a slot to the next customer in line when a cancellation occurs. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of automatic offer being made when a slot opens.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify automatic offer functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the system automatically offers a slot to the next customer when a cancellation occurs.
